channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What animal is the deformed-but-adorable Jimothy? The quiz knows - do you?
item.description: Also: Ryan Gosling's regrets, Zohran Mamdani's exhortations and the Smithsonian's alleged wokeness.

item.title: Trump refuses to give up on tariffs - a pillar of his economic legacy
item.description: The administration timed a new set of tariffs on all of its largest trading partners to take effect at the same time the old, global tariff ended.

item.title: US allies hit with new tariffs object to Trump's forced labor claims
item.description: Australia and the European Union were among U.S. trade partners who condemned the tariffs.

item.title: West Virginia paid digital nomads to move there during COVID. Many are staying
item.description: Ascend West Virginia is one of dozens of relocation initiatives across the country offering cash and other incentives to move to states needing an eco...
